headline: Texas Instruments to webcast its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders
summary: Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) (Nasdaq: TXN) will hold its annual meeting of stockholders on Thursday, April 16, at 8:30 a.m. Central time in Dallas. The audio webcast of the meeting can be heard live through the Investor Relations section of the company's website at ti.com/ir.
